shot_type_and_framing: medium shot, centered framing with the marble table top occupying the upper two-thirds of the frame and the gold base at the center
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the marble tabletop
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a 50mm focal length style, shallow depth of field focusing crisply on the marble surface and gold base, gently defocused plain background
environment_description: minimalist studio setting with a soft gray-white seamless backdrop emphasizing the table without distractions
subject_description: a round marble tabletop with subtle gray veining mounted on a smooth, reflective gold conical base, clean edges and polished finish
motion_behavior: static table with natural, subtle reflection and shadow interplay on smooth surfaces, no artificial movements
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, premium, realistic, and filmic with an emphasis on material texture and refined design
